summary.title: Summary
paragraphs: Full-stack engineer and UI/UX designer with 15+ years of experience building products at the intersection of design and engineering. I specialize in data-heavy interfaces — dashboards, monitoring tools, and real-time visualizations — with a strong background in the financial and IoT sectors.

My work spans the full product lifecycle: from Figma prototypes to production-ready code (Vue.js, React.js, TypeScript, Go). I'm equally comfortable discussing system architecture with backend teams and crafting pixel-perfect UI components.
Currently at DeGirum, I'm building high-performance visualization tools for large-scale IoT fleets — taking on challenges where off-the-shelf solutions simply don't exist.
I hold a degree in Computer Science, which grounds my design decisions in technical reality and helps me bridge the gap between what looks good and what actually ships.

bullets: Joined mid-development; audited and redesigned UI/UX from the ground up — from Figma prototypes to production-ready components (Vue.js, TypeScript, Nuxt, Tailwind CSS)
Built high-performance data visualizations for monitoring large fleets of edge IoT devices (Apache ECharts, D3.js, Canvas)
Created custom UI components for complex technical workflows; contributed to backend integration (Go)
Sole designer on an early-stage AI startup; defined the full product UX from scratch in close collaboration with founders — business logic, user flows, and interaction design
Designed end-to-end: onboarding, influencer-brand collaboration mechanics, and core product screens — from wireframes to interactive prototypes (Figma, ProtoPie, Framer)
Built a complete UI component library ensuring visual consistency across the product
Designed responsive interfaces for multiple banking products and internal systems; conducted user research and presented findings with actionable solutions
Maintained corporate UI Kit; mentored junior designers; contributed to both external and internal design systems
Developed web UIs, dashboards, and internal monitoring tools for marketing and operational metrics
Built and maintained UI component libraries; led UI architecture decisions for internal tooling; mentored junior team members
Full-stack development across backend services, data pipelines, and frontend UI (Symfony → Laravel, PHP, Python, PostgreSQL, JavaScript)
Built data visualization tools — charts, graphs, dashboards — using D3.js, JavaScript Canvas, and SVG for academic research teams (MIPT)
